title: microsorum irioides
intro: Microsorum irioides, also known as Java fern or Water clover fern, is a type of aquatic plant species belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum irioides include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Microsorum irioides can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
